nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸟纲

nodes.name: 山地森林

nodes.name: 绿顶辉蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 绿顶辉蜂鸟（Green-crowned brilliant，学名 Heliodoxa jacula），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联7个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。
nodes.shortSummary: 绿顶辉蜂鸟（学名：Heliodoxa jacula），是雨燕目蜂鸟科的一种鸟类。 绿顶辉蜂鸟体重约8.09克，翼长约70.3毫米，嘴峰长约26.4毫米，喙宽度约2.5毫米，喙厚度约2.8毫米，跗蹠长约6.3毫米，尾长约44.2毫米。绿顶辉蜂鸟在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在密集的高…

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies of green-crowned brilliant is found from Panamá Province in eastern Panama into Colombia, where it inhabits all three Andean ranges

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: jamersoni is found from Colombia's Nariño Department (and possibly from further north in Cauca Department) south along the western slope of the Andes of Ecuador at least as far as El Oro Province. The green-crowned brilliant inhabits a variety of landscapes including the interior, edges, and clearings of humid sub-montane and montane forest; mature secondary forest; and gardens
